name: multichat-partners
description: External partner-agent cluster — Hermes (local tui_gateway subprocess) + OpenClaw (per-partner WS clients to remote gateways) + the /v1/partners* REST routes that manage them. Owns the partner record list (loaded from bridge/partners.json — user state, stays at bridge root) and the bridge/partners/<id>.md prompt files. On activate, auto-starts the Hermes subprocess if any enabled partner record names it. Registers a `partner` entry in the `participantKinds` register so the multichat invitee picker sees partners only when this module is active. The Hermes/OpenClaw client modules are still required at request time by bridge/routes/chat.ts and bridge/modules/multichat-broadcast/runner.ts via the new module path.
